import urllib.request, json

out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013/files/poleg-polsky_2016_nmda-dsgc-multiplicative.pdf'

# eLink PubMed to get free full-text links
url = 'https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/elink.fcgi?dbfrom=pubmed&id=26948896&cmd=llinks&retmode=json'
headers = {'User-Agent': 'ResearchBot/1.0 (mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)'}
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as r:
    data = r.read().decode('utf-8')
    print(data[:3000])
